TSVAL: A Phase 1, Open-Label, Sequential Dose-Escalation Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability, and Preliminary Efficacy of a Single Intracoronary Infusion of HF-1002 in Adults with Nonischemic Cardiomy
TSVAL1: opathy and NYHA Class III Heart Failure

TSVAL: Nonischemic dilated cardiomyopathy, NYHA class III heart failure
Evaluate the safety and tolerability of a single intracoronary infusion of HF-1002 over a 12-month primary observation period.
